name: plugins
description: Claude Code & Nexgent plugin collection — team coordination, multi-perspective code review, systematic literature review, project onboarding, and dependency audit.

plugins.name: team-coord
plugins.description: Two subskills for agent team coordination — team-coord:lead orchestrates a team (pure coordinator, never does actual work), team-coord:teammate guides each worker (executes tasks, returns raw findings). Covers inbox sync protocol, WHAT vs HOW spawn philosophy, and unified report synthesis.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code review with 6 analysis lenses (security, performance, architecture, code quality, test quality, API design), unified findings format, health scoring (0-100), and iterative fix loop.

plugins.name: lit-review
plugins.description: Systematic literature review pipeline — multi-source academic search (arXiv, Semantic Scholar), citation network analysis, subtopic decomposition, and structured review synthesis.

plugins.name: project-onboarding
plugins.description: Automated project onboarding — scans structure, tech stack, build system, test framework, CI/CD, code style, and generates structured onboarding docs.

plugins.name: dep-audit
plugins.description: Dependency vulnerability audit — scans dependency files, checks OSV vulnerability database, detects outdated packages, flags license risks, and generates structured audit reports.

plugins.name: session-memory
plugins.description: Persistent cross-session memory — saves and restores conversation context, key decisions, findings, and progress. Supports tagging, search, auto-expiry, and team-coord handoff.

plugins.name: adr-generator
plugins.description: Architecture Decision Record generator — creates, manages, and indexes ADRs with multiple templates (MADR, Y-Statement), status tracking, and cross-referencing.
